executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates all green. Marketing independent verification remains fail-closed on missing Codeberg-primary adoption outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce measurable primary-repo adoption evidence before whole-stack certification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean: 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 errors, 0 running
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms full coherence with no disabled jobs, no error jobs, and no stuck running jobs.
findings.root_cause: Topology is healthy; prior internal-linking-watchdog Matrix delivery error has self-resolved.
findings.recommended_fix: No fix needed. Keep direct cron inspection as source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Agent architecture checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_checker.py returns clean pass — runtime contract, loop integrity, and ownership boundaries all healthy.

findings.title: Agent architecture verifier: ok=true, zero errors
findings.mechanism: Verifier confirms independent verification artifact is current and architecture runtime evidence is fresh.
findings.root_cause: Verifier now passes clean; prior staleness gap between verification artifact and runtime refresh is closed.

findings.title: Independent verification: qualified_pass, external blocker correctly localized
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_independent_verify.py returns ok=true with qualified_pass. The only errors are stale external-owner evidence from marketing, correctly classified as external.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-owned gates are clean; remaining blocker is properly externalized to marketing owner loop.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture fix needed. External marketing owner loop must produce adoption evidence.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed because Codeberg-primary adoption is measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only, not live runtime blockers
findings.mechanism: Disabled entries still exist in jobs.json history (17 names), but live Gateway topology exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are fully green.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth instead of persisted-history drift.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Prior run had verifier failing because independent verification artifact predated newer runtime evidence. Fresh independent verify + verifier rerun now passes clean (ok=true, zero errors).
Prior watchdog run showed internal-linking-watchdog with lastRunStatus=error (Matrix delivery target missing). Current live topology shows 0 error jobs — the error has self-resolved.
proof: openclaw cron list --json: 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 errors, 0 running

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Prior run showed 6 running jobs. Current live topology shows 0 running — no stuck jobs.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification passes with qualified_pass: architecture-owned gates are green. External marketing blocker is correctly localized.
independent_verification.previous_artifact_summary: Independent verification artifact predated newer runtime evidence; verifier was blocking. Now resolved.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are fully green, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture-owned gates are fully green: checker=OK, verifier=pass, independent_verify=qualified_pass, topology=26/26/0/0/0.
Prior internal-linking-watchdog Matrix delivery error has self-resolved (0 error jobs live).
Prior 6 running jobs have all completed (0 running jobs live).
The only remaining blocker is external: marketing independent verification on Codeberg-primary adoption evidence.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
No live timeout-budget repair was needed in this watchdog run.
